notes: Reproduces and locks in fidelity for productCreate with productOptions input. Real Shopify accepts productOptions, returns the materialized option/value graph, and synthesizes a first-combination default variant; the proxy must do the same instead of silently falling back to a Title / Default Title placeholder.

expectedDifferences.reason: The proxy generates a stable local product GID for the staged session; Shopify returns the dev-store product GID.
Product option IDs are allocated independently by Shopify and the local staging identity registry.
Product option value IDs are allocated independently by Shopify and the local staging identity registry.
Product option value IDs are allocated independently by Shopify and the local staging identity registry.

Product option value IDs are allocated independently by Shopify and the local staging identity registry.
Variant IDs are allocated independently by Shopify and the local staging identity registry.
The downstream proxy read returns the locally generated product GID.
The downstream proxy read returns the locally generated product option ID.
